segments.text: Manual triage is slow, inconsistent, and error-prone.

segments.label: B-roll 5 — Jira, email, chat — too many disconnecte
segments.text: Jira, email, chat — too many disconnected tools.

segments.label: Scene 1 — Dashboard Overview
segments.text: This dashboard provides admins with a real-time overview of tickets, customer statistics, and AI performance metrics.

segments.label: Scene 2 — Customer Management
segments.text: The Customer Management interface lists all registered users with their contact details for quick access.

segments.label: Scene 3 — User Management
segments.text: This User Management dashboard lets admins easily view, add, edit, or deactivate system users.

segments.label: Scene 4 — SLA Policy Configuration
segments.text: Quickly define and manage multiple SLA policies based on ticket priority, ensuring teams meet response and resolution times.

segments.label: Scene 5 — Analytics Intelligence Dashboard
segments.text: The Analytics Intelligence dashboard provides a clear overview of ticket activity, showing total tickets, open tickets, resolved tickets, and average resolution time.

segments.label: Scene 6 — Support Dashboard Overview
segments.text: Quickly access real-time stats on tickets, active agents, and recents alerts, enabling fast response and seamless team coordination.

segments.label: Scene 7 — Ticket Management Table
segments.text: This ticket management table displays all service requests, sorted by priority, product, and status, enabling rapid assignment and resolution.

segments.label: Scene 8 — Escalated Tickets View
segments.text: This dashboard offers a focused view of escalated tickets, letting your team filter by priority, status, and assignment.

segments.label: Scene 9 — Status Overview Dashboard
segments.text: The Status Overview panel provides a real-time snapshot of total, open, in-progress, and resolved support tickets.

segments.label: Scene 10 — Customer Selection
segments.text: Easily start the ticketing process by searching and selecting an existing customer.

segments.label: Scene 11 — Centralized Ticket Dashboard
segments.text: The main dashboard provides a clear summary of total, open, resolved, and reopened support tickets, helping managers track workload and team responsiveness at a glance.

segments.label: Scene 12 — Ticket List Dashboard
segments.text: The My Tickets dashboard displays all submitted support tickets with real-time status updates, priorities, and assignee information.

segments.label: Scene 13 — Product License Manager
segments.text: The My Products screen consolidates all registered hardware and software, showing details like license type, serial numbers, and expiry dates.

segments.label: Scene 14 — Issue Type Selection
segments.text: Users can immediately specify whether their problem is hardware or software-related, ensuring tickets are routed to the right experts.

segments.label: Benefit Slide — Value Adds
segments.text: TicketFlow delivers multi-role access control, real-time ticket tracking, SLA policy management, Jira integration, and analytics intelligence — everything your support team needs in one place.

segments.label: Presenter Close
segments.text: smarter & faster ticket resolution TicketFlow — contact us to arrange your live demonstration.
